case_title: THE WINE CLUB, INC VS. VINALIA IMPORTS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE WINE CLUB, INC AS TO DEFENDANT VINALIA IMPORTS, INC DUNBAR, BETTY L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE WINE CLUB, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINALIA IMPORTS, INC DUNBAR, BETTY L $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,149.43 INTEREST, $158.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,307.93, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF THE WINE CLUB, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2010 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-19-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINNTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONES HEARING FILED BY THE DEFENDANT IS "DENIED". THE CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE, MAR-29-2010 AT 5:30 PM. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. THE REQUEST WAS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A $10.00 FILING FEE. IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED, OR IF SERVICE WAS NOT TIMELY, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
